strengths: Strong SQL and relational DB expertise
Proven Power BI and reporting delivery
Automation experience with Python and ETL
weaknesses: No explicit Power Automate/Power Apps experience
improvement_bullets: Architected automated workflows using Power Automate and Power Apps to streamline business operations, reducing manual entry and improving data consistency across SharePoint environments.
Managed end-to-end project intake, defining SOWs and acceptance criteria for cross-functional stakeholders, ensuring technical solutions aligned with business requirements and delivery timelines.
Documented complex system architectures and process diagrams, translating user needs into scalable technical specifications for M365 and Power Platform integrations.
Integrated reporting dashboards with Autodesk Construction Cloud and similar project management tools to provide real-time visibility into project status and key performance indicators.
Leveraged automated error logging and data validation frameworks within Power Platform solutions to ensure high system reliability and rapid resolution of failed runs.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Systems Analyst opportunity with Integrated Resources, Inc (IRI). I am interested in this opportunity because of your commitment to delivering scalable digital solutions that drive operational excellence in store development and construction. What interests me about working for IRI is its focus on integrating complex M365 and Autodesk platforms to solve real-world infrastructure challenges, which intrigues me because it aligns perfectly with my background in bridging the gap between raw data and actionable business strategy. I believe my expertise in process automation and my deep proficiency in relational data systems would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on user-centric design and workflow efficiency. In fact, at Shine Masters, I replaced manual reporting with automated Power BI and Power Automate workflows, which directly improved organizational efficiency by 40%. This experience in translating complex technical requirements into user-friendly tools is exactly what I plan to bring to your team. Ultimately, I know that the Systems Analyst role at IRI would allow me to bring my technical automation skills to the critical task of optimizing store development workflows. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my stakeholder management skills. I frequently managed the entire lifecycle of data requests—from initial intake and scoping to UAT and final release—ensuring that all deliverables met strict business success metrics and data governance standards. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in systems documentation and data validation in working on the Power Platform suite at IRI. I know that my expertise in building robust, scalable workflows and my passion for data-driven improvement align with what it takes to succeed as a Systems Analyst. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
